summary: Phase 2 Multi-Firm Inventory System testing complete. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All Phase 2 UI features verified via Playwright testing.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console, not blocking)

seed_data_creation: Created test ledger entries during testing (adjustment_in with valid reason)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Multi-Firm Inventory features fully verified. Key features working: 1) Mandatory reason for adjustment_in/adjustment_out - API returns 400 with 'Reason is MANDATORY for stock adjustments' when reason is empty/whitespace, 2) Firm selection in Create Outbound Dispatch dialog - shows 'Required for inventory tracking' label, SKU dropdown disabled until firm selected, 3) SKU filtering by firm with in_stock_only parameter - GET /api/admin/skus?firm_id=xxx&in_stock_only=true correctly filters. Note: Existing SKUs don't have firm_id assigned (pre-multi-firm data), so SKU dropdown shows 'No SKUs available with stock in this firm' - this is correct behavior.

mandatory_reason_for_adjustments.POST /api/inventory/ledger (adjustment_i: PASS - Returns 400 'Reason is MANDATORY for stock adjustments'
mandatory_reason_for_adjustments.POST /api/inventory/ledger (adjustment_o: PASS - Returns 400 'Reason is MANDATORY for stock adjustments'
mandatory_reason_for_adjustments.POST /api/inventory/ledger (purchase wit: PASS - Entry created (reason not mandatory for purchase)
mandatory_reason_for_adjustments.UI_mandatory_indicator: PASS - Shows '* (Mandatory for adjustments)' in orange when adjustment type selected

firm_selection_in_dispatch.firm_select_present: PASS - Firm dropdown present with 'Required for inventory tracking' label
firm_selection_in_dispatch.sku_disabled_before_firm: PASS - SKU dropdown disabled until firm is selected
firm_selection_in_dispatch.sku_enabled_after_firm: PASS - SKU dropdown enabled after firm selection
firm_selection_in_dispatch.POST /api/dispatches (SKU not in firm): PASS - Returns 400 'SKU not found' or 'not available in selected firm'

sku_filtering_by_firm.GET /api/admin/skus?firm_id=xxx: PASS - Returns only SKUs for specified firm
sku_filtering_by_firm.GET /api/admin/skus?in_stock_only=true: PASS - Returns only SKUs with stock_quantity > 0
sku_filtering_by_firm.GET /api/admin/skus?firm_id=xxx&in_stock: PASS - Returns SKUs matching both criteria

inventory_page.mandatory_reason_indicator: PASS - Shows '* (Mandatory for adjustments)' in orange when adjustment selected
inventory_page.reason_field_placeholder: PASS - Shows 'MANDATORY: Enter reason for this adjustment' for adjustments
inventory_page.reason_field_border: PASS - Orange border when adjustment type selected and reason empty

accountant_dashboard.outbound_tab: PASS - Tab clickable and shows content
accountant_dashboard.firm_select_required_label: PASS - Shows 'Required for inventory tracking' in orange
accountant_dashboard.firm_dropdown: PASS - Shows all active firms with GSTIN
accountant_dashboard.sku_dropdown_disabled: PASS - Disabled before firm selection, shows 'Select firm first'
accountant_dashboard.sku_dropdown_filtered: PASS - Shows only SKUs with stock in selected firm (or 'No SKUs available')

data_notes.existing_skus_no_firm: Existing SKUs (MG-BAT-*, MG-INV-*, etc.) don't have firm_id assigned - they were created before multi-firm feature. This is why SKU dropdown shows 'No SKUs available with stock in this firm' when a firm is selected.
data_notes.raw_materials_have_firm: Raw materials created via the new inventory system DO have firm_id assigned and work correctly with firm filtering.
